tagline: ADR-022 shape/density exemplar — sharp radius + tightened spacing. Storybook-only, not a real client.
_notes: Exemplar tenant proving the per-tenant shape+density overlay axis from ADR-022 (#128, epic #124). Not a real client — Storybook/Chromatic exemplar only, no deployment.
Overrides role.radius (0, density-invariant) and semantic.space.component.padding (16px comfortable baseline, 8px under [data-density="compact"] via the Compact figma-variables mode).
Wired into .storybook/preview.tsx's BRANDS list (#126 modes matrix) so every component already exercising MODES gets brutalist-demo coverage automatically.
